title: Buttery French Asparagus Salad
description: This raw-friendly, buttery French asparagus salad features crisp, midnight-craving flavors and is perfect for a light meal.

ingredients.name: Raw Egg Yolk
ingredients.notes: For a raw-friendly twist, use yolk only.

ingredients.name: Lettuce Leaves
ingredients.notes: Iceberg or any type of lettuce for added freshness.

instructions: Wash and trim the asparagus to remove tough ends.
Place the asparagus in a salad bowl, leaving some pieces whole for visual appeal.
Crack and beat the egg yolks together lightly until well combined but not fully blended. Do not over-mix; this helps maintain the raw texture.
Top the asparagus with the beaten egg yolks and finely chopped fresh parsley.
Garnish with any extra lettuce leaves if desired to add a bit more freshness and color.
